mnemonics.title: Importing is Easy
mnemonics.content: I.E. - Import Explicitly: Use import statements to access classes from other packages.

mnemonics.title: Packages Are Friends
mnemonics.content: PAF - Packages Are Friends: Import them to use their classes and interfaces.

mnemonics.title: Classpath is Key
mnemonics.content: CIK - Classpath Is Key: Java searches the classpath to find classes and interfaces.
